home.welcomeSubtitle: Empowering communities through free, clean water
home.missionText: We believe that access to clean water is a fundamental right. Our mission is to provide free, clean drinking water to communities in need.
home.heroSubtitle: From mountain springs to your hands — in 100% recyclable tetrapacks.
home.mainSubtitle: From mountain springs to your hands — in 100% recyclable tetrapacks.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Making charitable giving accessible, transparent, and impactful
home.step1Description: Premium spring water at no cost. Every bottle funds clean water projects globally.
home.step2Description: Your choice directly supports local artists and creative programs in communities.
home.step3Description: Empower the next generation with access to quality education and learning resources.
home.step4Description: See exactly where your impact goes with real-time dashboards and verified reports.
home.videoDescription: Watch how we're revolutionizing charitable giving with transparency, innovation, and real impact. Every view supports our mission.
home.threeWaysSubtitle: Every GRATIS product supports clean water, arts & culture, and education worldwide
home.pillar1Description: Providing sustainable water solutions to communities in need. Every bottle funds wells, filtration systems, and water education.
home.pillar2Description: Empowering local artists and preserving cultural heritage. Supporting creative programs that bring communities together.
home.pillar3Description: Breaking barriers to education worldwide. Funding scholarships, resources, and programs for underserved youth.
home.joinMovementSubtitle: Thousands of impact-driven individuals and organizations trust GRATIS
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of TRIBE members creating positive change with every choice. 100% transparent. 100% impactful.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about GRATIS Water
faq.q1: What makes GRATIS Water different from other bottled water?
faq.a1: GRATIS Water is the only water brand that's 100% advertiser-funded at distribution points, uses truly sustainable Tetrapack packaging (not plastic), and donates 40% of retail profits to clean water, arts, and education initiatives. Plus, TRIBE members can claim free bottles monthly.
faq.q2: Is Tetrapack really better than plastic?
faq.a2: Yes! Tetrapack has a 3x lower carbon footprint than plastic bottles, is actually recyclable (unlike most plastic which ends up in landfills), and contains zero microplastics. Over 90% of plastic is never recycled — Tetrapack solves this problem.
faq.q3: How can I claim free bottles as a TRIBE member?
faq.a3: TRIBE members get monthly free bottles based on their tier: Insiders get 2/month, Core get 4/month, and Founders get 10/month. Simply log into your dashboard and click 'Claim Bottle' — we'll ship it free to your address.
faq.q4: Where does the water come from?
faq.a4: Our water is sourced from protected natural mountain springs in Europe. Each batch is tested for purity and mineral balance. The exact source is printed on every package as part of our transparency commitment.
faq.q5: What happens to my money when I buy GRATIS Water?
faq.a5: 40% of profits go to verified NGO partners (split: 40% clean water, 30% arts, 30% education). You can see exactly where your money goes on our Impact Dashboard, updated in real-time. TRIBE members even vote on quarterly allocations.

faq.title: TRIBE Membership FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about joining TRIBE
faq.q1: What's the difference between the tiers?
faq.a1: Explorer is free and gives you newsletter access. Insider (€9.99/month) gets you 2 free bottles and voting rights. Core (€97/year) doubles your bottles and perks. Founder (€247 one-time) is lifetime membership with maximum benefits.
faq.q2: Can I cancel my membership anytime?
faq.a2: Yes! Insider and Core memberships can be canceled anytime with no penalties. Founder is a one-time payment for lifetime access (non-refundable after 30 days).
faq.q3: How does the voting system work?
faq.a3: Every quarter, Insider+ members receive a ballot to vote on fund allocation across water, arts, and education projects. Core members' votes count 2x, Founders' count 3x. Results are implemented immediately and published transparently.
faq.q4: When do I get my free bottles?
faq.a4: Free bottles reset on the 1st of each month. You can claim them anytime during the month via your dashboard. We ship within 3-5 business days.
faq.q5: What happens if I upgrade my tier?
faq.a5: You can upgrade anytime! You'll get immediate access to higher tier perks. If you're on a paid tier, we'll prorate the difference. Founder is a one-time upgrade from any tier.
faq.a6: Absolutely not. The price you see is the price you pay. No signup fees, no hidden charges. Free shipping on claimed bottles.
faq.a7: Yes! Contact support@gratis.ngo and we'll set up a gift membership for you. Perfect for conscious gift-givers.
faq.q8: What if the Founder tier sells out?
faq.a8: Once all 1.000 Founder spots are claimed, the tier closes forever. Those who secured it will remain lifetime Founders with all future perks included.
faq.contactPrompt: Our team is here to help you find the perfect tier.

problem.title: The Problem We're Solving
problem.subtitle: Understanding why GRATIS exists and the change we're creating
problem.point1: Billions of plastic bottles end up in landfills and oceans every year, causing irreversible environmental damage
problem.point2: Traditional beverage advertising budgets go to corporations instead of causes that need support
problem.point3: Consumers lack transparency about where their money goes when they buy products
problem.point4: NGOs struggle to find sustainable funding sources for their vital work
problem.solution1: Infinitely recyclable aluminum bottles that eliminate plastic waste from the equation
problem.solution2: 100% of advertising revenue redirected to verified NGOs working on critical global challenges
problem.solution3: Complete transparency with real-time impact tracking and quarterly financial reports
problem.solution4: A sustainable business model that grows as our community grows, funding more impact

step3.title: 100% Goes to NGOs
